title: circaea cordata
intro: Circaea cordata, also known as the heart-wrench or wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lythraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Circaea cordata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Circaea cordata often involve drying and infusing the leaves and stems to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
